title: "pairwise()"
description: "pairwise: emit `[previous, current]` for each consecutive pair; the very first value produces no pair (quiet → undirty RESOLVED). Previous value is kept in `ctx.state`."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

pairwise: emit `[previous, current]` for each consecutive pair; the very first value produces no
pair (quiet → undirty RESOLVED). Previous value is kept in `ctx.state`.

## Import

```ts
import { pairwise } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Signature

```ts
function pairwise(): Operator<S, readonly [S, S]>
```

## Returns

A `Operator<S, readonly [S, S]>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { pairwise } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/operators.ts`
